claimBoundary: This geometry-only D28/D32 census can clear or localize fine-pair direction support at one source phase. It cannot validate wall velocity, interpolation, force magnitude, phase history, bird-load grid convergence, experimental agreement, quantitative bird flight, or free flight, and it authorizes no production edit or D36 run.
classificationRule: Classify invalid-census-parity if Metal and CPU masks or any component/direction count differ. Classify production-link-set-mismatch if either total differs from its archived moving-run active-link reference by more than 5%. Otherwise clear fine-pair direction redistribution only if exact opposite balance, closed-surface equilibrium cancellation, whole/component histograms, and both inherited fixed-profile response gates pass.

fixedPopulationProfiles.source: rho=1, u=0 D3Q19 equilibrium; q0 is unused by the link sum

count-weighted D28/D32 midpoint reflected-population means pooled over the 11 audited endpoints and every non-direction stratum; q0 and the unsupported pure-y directions are zero and unused because every canonical normal lies in the audited X/Z force plane

normalizationDefinition: Normalize a D28/D32 response-vector change by the mean absolute direction ledger: 0.5*(sum_q ||term_D28,q|| + sum_q ||term_D32,q||). This remains finite when the closed-surface net response cancels. Direction histograms normalize N_q*dx^2 by their total over q.
responseDefinition: For grid g, component p, and fixed profile k, reconstruct the outward solid-to-fluid link response R_gpk = sum_q 2*f_kq*c_q*N_gpq*dx_g^2 from the archived Metal link counts. Whole-bird response is the exact sum over the four components.
selectionRule: At source sample 53 (26.5 ms), raster the complete measured-dove surface independently through the production Metal indexed-surface path and CPU reference at D28 and D32. Enumerate every current solid-to-fluid D3Q19 link by component and direction. Execute no population allocation, collision, streaming, force estimator, or topology evolution. Require exact Metal/CPU masks and direction counts; compare total counts with the already archived production active-link totals; then apply the inherited curved-canonical histogram and fixed-population response ledgers without changing their thresholds.
